content:
diff --git a/packages/ui/src/engine/pixel-characters.ts b/packages/ui/src/engine/pixel-characters.ts
index 3f4e2a7..a7c9b9d 100644
--- a/packages/ui/src/engine/pixel-characters.ts
+++ b/packages/ui/src/engine/pixel-characters.ts
@@ -670,6 +670,262 @@
 ];
 
+// Detailed pixel-art sprites for furniture (24x24 to 32x32 pixels)
+// Each sprite is an array of strings, each string is a row of pixels
+// Characters represent colors, mapped in palette below
+
+const THRONE_SPRITE = [
+  "        BBBBBBBB        ",
+  "      BBRRRRRRRRBB      ",
+  "     BRRRRRRRRRRRRB     ",
+  "    BRRRRRRRRRRRRRRB    ",
+  "   BRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRB   ",
+  "  BRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRB  ",
+  "  BRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRB  ",
+  "  BRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRB  ",
+  "  BBRRRRRRRRRRRRRRRBB   ",
+  "   BBBRRRRRRRRRRBBB     ",
+  "    BBBBBBBBBBBBBB      ",
+  "    BBBBWWWWWWBBBB      ",
+  "    BBBBWWWWWWBBBB      ",
+  "    BBBBWWWWWWBBBB      ",
+  "    BBBBWWWWWWBBBB      ",
+  "    BBBBWWWWWWBBBB      ",
+  "    BBBBWWWWWWBBBB      ",
+  "    BBBBWWWWWWBBBB      ",
+  "    BBBBBBBBBBBBBB      ",
+  "                        ",
+  "                        ",
+  "                        ",
+  "                        ",
+  "                        ",
+];
+
+const PLANNING_TABLE_SPRITE = [
+  "      PPPPPPPPPPPP      ",
+  "     PGGGGGGGGGGGGP     ",
+  "    PGGGGGGGGGGGGGGP    ",
+  "   PGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGP   ",
+  "  PGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGP  ",
+  "  PGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGP  ",
+  "  PGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGP  ",
+  "  PGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGP  ",
+  "  PGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGP  ",
+  "   PPPPPPPPPPPPPPPP     ",
+  "   PBBBBBBBBBBBBBBP     ",
+  "   PBBBBBBBBBBBBBBP     ",
+  "   PBBBBBBBBBBBBBBP     ",
+  "   PBBBBBBBBBBBBBBP     ",
+  "   PBBBBBBBBBBBBBBP     ",
+  "   PBBBBBBBBBBBBBBP     ",
+  "   PBBBBBBBBBBBBBBP     ",
+  "   PPPPPPPPPPPPPPPP     ",
+  "                        ",
+  "                        ",
+  "                        ",
+  "                        ",
+  "                        ",
+  "                        ",
+];
+
+const WEAPON_RACK_SPRITE = [
+  "        RRRRRRRR        ",
+  "       RRRRRRRRRR       ",
+  "      RRRRRRRRRRRR      ",
+  "     RRRRRRRRRRRRRR     ",
+  "    RRRRRRRRRRRRRRRR    ",
+  "    RRRRRRRRRRRRRRRR    ",
+  "    RRRRRRRRWWRRRRRR    ",
+  "    RRRRRRRRWWRRRRRR    ",
+  "    RRRRRRRRWWRRRRRR    ",
+  "    RRRRRRRRWWRRRRRR    ",
+  "    RRRRRRRRWWRRRRRR    ",
+  "    RRRRRRRRWWRRRRRR    ",
+  "    RRRRRRRRWWRRRRRR    ",
+  "    RRRRRRRRRRRRRRRR    ",
+  "    RRRRRRRRRRRRRRRR    ",
+  "     RRRRRRRRRRRRRR     ",
+  "      RRRRRRRRRRRR      ",
+  "       RRRRRRRRRR       ",
+  "        RRRRRRRR        ",
+  "                        ",
+  "                        ",
+  "                        ",
+  "                        ",
+  "                        ",
+];
+
+const WORKBENCH_SPRITE = [
+  "  WWWWWWWWWWWWWWWW  ",
+  "  WBBBBBBBBBBBBBBW  ",
+  "  WBBBBBBBBBBBBBBW  ",
+  "  WBBBBBBBBBBBBBBW  ",
+  "  WBBBBBBBBBBBBBBW  ",
+  "  WBBBBBBBBBBBBBBW  ",
+  "  WBBBBBBBBBBBBBBW  ",
+  "  WBBBBBBBBBBBBBBW  ",
+  "  WBBBBBBBBBBBBBBW  ",
+  "  WBBBBBBBBBBBBBBW  ",
+  "  WBBBBBBBBBBBBBBW  ",
+  "  WBBBBBBBBBBBBBBW  ",
+  "  WBBBBBBBBBBBBBBW  ",
+  "  WBBBBBBBBBBBBBBW  ",
+  "  WBBBBBBBBBBBBBBW  ",
+  "  WBBBBBBBBBBBBBBW  ",
+  "  WWWWWWWWWWWWWWWW  ",
+  "                    ",
+  "                    ",
+  "                    ",
+];
+
+const POTION_SHELF_SPRITE = [
+  "   SSSSSSSSSSSSSS   ",
+  "  SPPPPPPPPPPPPPPS  ",
+  "  SPPPPPPPPPPPPPPS  ",
+  "  SPPPPPPPPPPPPPPS  ",
+  "  SPPPPPPPPPPPPPPS  ",
+  "  SPPPPPPPPPPPPPPS  ",
+  "  SPPPPPPPPPPPPPPS  ",
+  "  SSSSSSSSSSSSSSSS  ",
+  "  SBBBBBBBBBBBBBBS  ",
+  "  SBBBBBBBBBBBBBBS  ",
+  "  SBBBBBBBBBBBBBBS  ",
+  "  SBBBBBBBBBBBBBBS  ",
+  "  SBBBBBBBBBBBBBBS  ",
+  "  SBBBBBBBBBBBBBBS  ",
+  "  SBBBBBBBBBBBBBBS  ",
+  "  SSSSSSSSSSSSSSSS  ",
+  "                    ",
+  "                    ",
+  "                    ",
+];
+
+const SCRIBE_DESK_SPRITE = [
+  "   DDDDDDDDDDDDDD   ",
+  "  DWWWWWWWWWWWWWWD  ",
+  "  DWWTTTTTTTTTTWWD  ",
+  "  DWWTTTTTTTTTTWWD  ",
+  "  DWWTTTTTTTTTTWWD  ",
+  "  DWWTTTTTTTTTTWWD  ",
+  "  DWWTTTTTTTTTTWWD  ",
+  "  DWWTTTTTTTTTTWWD  ",
+  "  DWWWWWWWWWWWWWWD  ",
+  "  DDDDDDDDDDDDDDDD  ",
+  "                    ",
+  "                    ",
+  "                    ",
+];
+
+const HEALING_BASIN_SPRITE = [
+  "      BBBBBBBB      ",
+  "    BBWWWWWWWWBB    ",
+  "   BWWWWWWWWWWWB   ",
+  "  BWWWWWWWWWWWWWB  ",
+  "  BWWWWWWWWWWWWWB  ",
+  "  BWWWWWWWWWWWWWB  ",
+  "  BWWWWWWWWWWWWWB  ",
+  "  BWWWWWWWWWWWWWB  ",
+  "  BWWWWWWWWWWWWWB  ",
+  "   BWWWWWWWWWWWB   ",
+  "    BBWWWWWWWWBB    ",
+  "      BBBBBBBB      ",
+  "                    ",
+  "                    ",
+  "                    ",
+];
+
+const FURNITURE_PALETTE = {
+  B: '#8B4513', // Brown wood
+  R: '#D2691E', // Red wood
+  W: '#F0E68C', // Light yellow (cloth or light wood)
+  P: '#C0C0C0', // Planning table grey
+  G: '#708090', // Planning table glass/metal
+  S: '#A0522D', // Shelf wood
+  D: '#DEB887', // Desk wood
+  T: '#FFFFE0', // Paper on desk
+  L: '#ADD8E6', // Light blue water
+};
+
+function drawSpriteDefDetailed(
+  ctx: CanvasRenderingContext2D,
+  sprite: string[],
+  palette: Record<string, string>,
+  x: number,
+  y: number,
+  s: number,
+  flipH: boolean,
+) {
+  for (let row = 0; row < sprite.length; row++) {
+    const line = sprite[row];
+    for (let col = 0; col < line.length; col++) {
+      const c = line[col];
+      if (c === ' ') continue;
+      const color = palette[c] || '#000000';
+      ctx.fillStyle = color;
+      const drawX = flipH ? x + (line.length - 1 - col) * s : x + col * s;
+      ctx.fillRect(drawX, y + row * s, s, s);
+    }
+  }
+}
+
+// Furniture drawing functions with detailed sprites
+function drawThrone(ctx: CanvasRenderingContext2D, x: number, y: number, s: number) {
+  drawSpriteDefDetailed(ctx, THRONE_SPRITE, FURNITURE_PALETTE, x, y, s, false);
+}
+
+function drawPlanningTable(ctx: CanvasRenderingContext2D, x: number, y: number, s: number) {
+  drawSpriteDefDetailed(ctx, PLANNING_TABLE_SPRITE, FURNITURE_PALETTE, x, y, s, false);
+}
+
+function drawWeaponRack(ctx: CanvasRenderingContext2D, x: number, y: number, s: number) {
+  drawSpriteDefDetailed(ctx, WEAPON_RACK_SPRITE, FURNITURE_PALETTE, x, y, s, false);
+}
+
+function drawWorkbench(ctx: CanvasRenderingContext2D, x: number, y: number, s: number) {
+  drawSpriteDefDetailed(ctx, WORKBENCH_SPRITE, FURNITURE_PALETTE, x, y, s, false);
+}
+
+function drawPotionShelf(ctx: CanvasRenderingContext2D, x: number, y: number, s: number) {
+  drawSpriteDefDetailed(ctx, POTION_SHELF_SPRITE, FURNITURE_PALETTE, x, y, s, false);
+}
+
+function drawScribeDesk(ctx: CanvasRenderingContext2D, x: number, y: number, s: number) {
+  drawSpriteDefDetailed(ctx, SCRIBE_DESK_SPRITE, FURNITURE_PALETTE, x, y, s, false);
+}
+
+function drawHealingBasin(ctx: CanvasRenderingContext2D, x: number, y: number, s: number) {
+  drawSpriteDefDetailed(ctx, HEALING_BASIN_SPRITE, FURNITURE_PALETTE, x, y, s, false);
+}
+
+// Exported drawFurniture function updated to use detailed sprites
+export function drawFurniture(ctx: CanvasRenderingContext2D, furnitureType: string, x: number, y: number, size: number) {
+  switch (furnitureType) {
+    case 'throne':
+      drawThrone(ctx, x, y, size);
+      break;
+    case 'planningTable':
+      drawPlanningTable(ctx, x, y, size);
+      break;
+    case 'weaponRack':
+      drawWeaponRack(ctx, x, y, size);
+      break;
+    case 'workbench':
+      drawWorkbench(ctx, x, y, size);
+      break;
+    case 'potionShelf':
+      drawPotionShelf(ctx, x, y, size);
+      break;
+    case 'scribeDesk':
+      drawScribeDesk(ctx, x, y, size);
+      break;
+    case 'healingBasin':
+      drawHealingBasin(ctx, x, y, size);
+      break;
+    default:
+      // fallback: draw a simple square
+      ctx.fillStyle = '#666666';
+      ctx.fillRect(x, y, size, size);
+      break;
+  }
+}
+
